#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Discovery Hunt Round 3 — temporal, volume, regime, microstructure."""
import sys, os, math
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from scipy import stats

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), ".."))
from backend.calc.backtest_hyper import fast_ema, fast_sma, fast_rsi, fast_macd_hist

DATA_DIR = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "..", "data")
E = math.e; PHI = (1+math.sqrt(5))/2
GZ_C = 1/E; GZ_U = 0.5; GZ_L = 0.5-math.log(4/3); GZ_W = math.log
